metadata.title: Feet to Inches Converter – Convert Feet to Inches
metadata.description: Convert feet to inches. Ready-made tables lower on the page show height in feet and inches as total inches (5 feet 7 inches is 67 inches) and common sizes. The feet to inches converter works both ways and calculates instantly.

hero.title: Convert feet to inches
hero.description: Enter a value in feet and read the result in inches straight away. Feet turn into inches most often for height, equipment sizes and screen diagonals. Watch the height notation, though: 5 feet 7 inches is not the same as 5.7 feet. A separate table lower down shows how many inches a height in feet and inches comes to.

howTo.name: How do you convert feet to inches?
howTo.description: A short guide to using the feet to inches converter.

steps.name: Enter the value in feet
steps.text: In the left field, type the number of feet you want to convert to inches. The converter takes a single number, so turn a height like 5 feet 7 inches into inches first using the table below.

steps.name: Read the result in inches
steps.text: The result in inches appears immediately in the field next to it, on the right. The Copy result button places it on the clipboard.

steps.name: Reverse the direction if you need to
steps.text: Click Swap order to move over to converting inches to feet.

contentBlocks.title: Why convert feet to inches?
contentBlocks.html:
Feet and inches sit side by side in everyday measuring, so you convert whenever a value in feet has to read in the finer unit: a height you want stated in inches, a size you need to compare with a screen diagonal, or a dimension given in feet where you want the exact inch figure.

The relationship is simple and exact: one foot is 12 inches. To turn feet into inches, you multiply the number of feet by 12. The converter does that for you the moment you type a value.

There is a catch in the height notation, though. "5 feet 7 inches" is not the same as "5.7 feet". The converter takes a single number, so if you type 5.7 it works out 5.7 × 12 = 68.4 inches. But 5 feet 7 inches is 67 inches. So convert a height in feet and inches with the table below, not by typing it with a decimal point.
contentBlocks.imageAlt: Free feet to inches converter – Arteon

contentBlocks.title: How does the feet to inches conversion work? Formula and example
contentBlocks.html:
Converting feet to inches rests on one fixed relationship: one foot is exactly 12 inches. To turn feet into inches, you multiply the number of feet by 12.

Full formula: inches = feet × 12. The other way round: feet = inches ÷ 12.

Example: you want to know how many inches 6 feet is. You substitute: 6 × 12 = 72 inches. It is the most frequently converted value, because "six feet" is a common height in English-speaking countries.

Mind the height notation. If you have 5 feet 7 inches, do not type 5.7, because the converter would work out 68.4 inches. You get the inches of a height like this: multiply the feet by 12 and add the inches. For 5 feet 7 inches that is 5 × 12 + 7 = 67 inches. Ready values are in the height table below.

contentBlocks.title: Feet to inches conversion table
contentBlocks.description: The table below converts common values in feet into inches. The values are exact, because every foot is 12 inches. To convert a different measurement, use the converter above.
contentBlocks.caption: Need the other direction? Use our inches to feet converter with a height table in feet and inches.

contentBlocks.title: Height table: feet and inches to total inches
contentBlocks.description: Height in English-speaking countries is written in feet and inches, for example 5 feet 7 inches. To get the total inches, you multiply the feet by 12 and add the inches. The table below gives ready results for the most common heights, so you avoid the mix-up with the decimal form.
contentBlocks.caption: Example: 5 feet 7 inches is 5 × 12 + 7 = 67 inches. Do not confuse it with 5.7 feet, which gives 68.4 inches.

contentBlocks.title: When do people convert feet to inches?
contentBlocks.description: Feet turn into inches in a handful of everyday situations.

items.title: Height in feet and inches
items.description: Height is stated as feet and inches, for example 5 feet 10 inches. To turn it into total inches, multiply the feet by 12 and add the inches: 5 × 12 + 10 = 70 inches. Ready values are in the height table above, so you will not confuse the notation with a decimal number.

items.title: Screen diagonals
items.description: Screen diagonals are given in inches, so a size stated in feet sometimes needs turning into inches to compare. A screen with a 5-foot diagonal is 60 inches, and a projector with an 8-foot diagonal is 96 inches. Converting helps you match the equipment to the space.

items.title: Furniture and equipment
items.description: Catalogs give dimensions in feet, but for fitting you need the finer inch figure. A worktop 4 feet long is 48 inches, and a cabinet 6 feet tall is 72 inches. Converting gives the dimension in the unit the fine details are usually stated in.

items.title: DIY and lumber
items.description: Boards, trim and mouldings are sold by the foot and cut by the inch. An 8-foot board is 96 inches, and a 3-foot length of trim is 36 inches. Converting helps you plan the cut without a slip.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about converting feet to inches

items.question: How many inches is 6 feet?
items.answer: 6 feet is 72 inches. The calculation: 6 × 12 = 72 inches. It is the most frequently converted value, because "six feet" is a common height in English-speaking countries.

items.question: How many inches is 5 feet?
items.answer: 5 feet is 60 inches. The calculation: 5 × 12 = 60 inches. That is also the height 5 foot 0.

items.question: How many inches is 5 feet 7 inches?
items.answer: 5 feet 7 inches is 67 inches. The calculation: 5 × 12 + 7 = 67 inches. Do not confuse it with 5.7 feet, which gives 68.4 inches — that is a completely different notation.

items.question: Is 5.7 feet the same as 5 feet 7 inches?
items.answer: No. 5.7 feet is a decimal figure and gives 5.7 × 12 = 68.4 inches. A height of 5 feet 7 inches is 67 inches. The gap comes from the fact that 0.7 of a foot is 8.4 inches, not 7 inches. Always write height as separate feet and inches.

items.question: How many inches is 5 feet 10 inches?
items.answer: 5 feet 10 inches is 70 inches. The calculation: 5 × 12 + 10 = 70 inches.

items.question: How many inches are 3 and 4 feet?
items.answer: 3 feet is 36 inches, and 4 feet is 48 inches. You get both by multiplying the number of feet by 12.

items.question: How many inches is 12 feet?
items.answer: 12 feet is 144 inches. The calculation: 12 × 12 = 144 inches. The same number, 144, is also the number of square inches in a square foot, but that is a different quantity.

items.question: How many inches is 67 feet?
items.answer: 67 feet is 804 inches. The calculation: 67 × 12 = 804 inches. If you were after the height 5 feet 7 inches, that is 67 inches, not 67 feet.

items.question: How do you turn a height in feet and inches into total inches?
items.answer: Multiply the feet by 12 and add the inches. Example: 6 feet 2 inches is 6 × 12 + 2 = 74 inches. Ready values for the most common heights are in the table above.

items.question: What is the formula for converting feet to inches?
items.answer: The formula is: inches = feet × 12. For example, 7 × 12 = 84 inches. The other way round: feet = inches ÷ 12.

items.question: Does this converter convert square feet to square inches?
items.answer: No. This tool converts length, and a square foot is a unit of area. The factor is different: 1 square foot is 144 square inches, so you multiply an area in square feet by 144.

items.question: Can I convert pound-feet to pound-inches here?
items.answer: No. Pound-feet and pound-inches are units of torque, not length, so this converter does not handle them. The factor is the same (1 pound-foot is 12 pound-inches), but it is a different physical quantity.
